# SubscriptionState enumeration

The lifecycle states of a subscription (spec §10.7).

```csharp
public enum SubscriptionState
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Opening | `0` | Created but not yet acknowledged; no change notification may precede the acknowledgement. |
| Active | `1` | Acknowledged; change notifications matching the honored filter may flow. |
| Closed | `2` | Closed; retains no resumable state. |
